notes: Crimson Game Mods v1.0.2 — Light theme finally works live (no restart needed); FlowLayout wraps the ItemBuffs button bar so nothing gets clipped on narrow windows; Discord menu shortcut; Export All Formats dev button (JSON+RawMod+CDUMM in one click → 3 subfolders + README); Universal Proficiency now exports cleanly in all 3 formats including JSON Patch; 275 equip buffs load into the dropdown (path bug post-split); CDUMM export uses uncompressed PackGroupBuilder so small index files don't break under LZ4; Mesh Swap rebuilt — sits next to Load FieldInfo, independent target/source filters, Pet(Cat)/Pet(Dog)/Mount(Horse)/Mount(Special) tiers from a 216-key authoritative pet catalog; Transmog dialog gets quick-filter buttons (⛑ helm / 🛡 chest / 🗡 sword / 🏹 bow / 💍 ring etc.); Preview Item moved next to imbue Add to Selected; effect dropdown no longer eats the Apply Effect button; bumped Transmog button visibility on the main row.
